lead_level_notes.notes: Preprint/source-family lead; keep for OSF data/code inventory.
Duplicate DOI/preprint hit for the same source-family candidate.

next_action: Keep as a source-family candidate and inventory OSF project 9r62x plus dataset sfdq4/code scripts; route only confirmed original/replication effect-size rows to result-table extraction.
preferred_source_family_name: Successes and Failures of Replications based on OSF Registries
reason: The article/preprint describes a meta-analysis of independent replication studies registered on OSF and points to open data/code, including an OSF project and dataset. It may be a reusable source object, but its rows need inventory because only a subset appear to contain comparable original and replication effect sizes.
